ticket.title: QA the scheduling beta before GA
ticket.description: Run a regression and acceptance pass on interview scheduling: timezones, double-booking, the 14-day window, and the rollback path.

code_agent.rationale: Code sees acceptance, the timezone decision, the test strategy, and the project goal; release entries are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, Bob's note is private.

qa_agent.rationale: QA needs acceptance, timezone, both release entries, and the test strategy; the project goal is out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, Bob's note is private.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees acceptance, the timezone decision, and the goal; release/codebase entries are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, Bob's note is private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees acceptance, timezone, both release entries, and the goal; the test strategy (codebase) is out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, Bob's note is private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry including the rejected decision; only Bob's local note is invisible to her.
